from __future__ import annotations


def emit(metric: str, value: int) -> tuple[str, int]:
    return metric, value


def metric_emission_occurs_per_item_inside_inner_loop_negative(batches: list[list[int]]) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:
    out: list[tuple[str, int]] = []
    for batch in batches:
        out.append(emit("batch.items_processed", len(batch)))
    return out
